descriptions.description: The 5ml metal atomizer with a 10mm thread offers a compact, portable format for perfume and fragrance. Travel and sample brands use this for a fine mist spray in a durable metal shell. A classic format for perfume discovery.

A 10ml metal atomizer with a 17mm thread for perfume and fragrance formats. Travel and full-size brands choose this for a premium, reusable spray. The metal construction protects formulations and adds a luxury feel.
